column1: Say "I study Japanese at school" (use で for location).
column3: がっこうにほんごをべんきょうします。
column4: 学校で日本語を勉強します。
column5: で: action-location particle — marks where the verb action takes place
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:standard

column1: Say "I go to the supermarket" (use に for destination).
column5: に: destination particle — marks the goal of directional movement
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: Say "I read a book every day" (use を for direct object).
column3: まいにちほんをよみます。
column5: を: direct-object particle — marks the thing undergoing the transitive action
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: Say "She is a student too" (use も for inclusion).
column3: かのじょもがくせいです。
column5: も: additive particle — 'also/too'; adds X to a previously mentioned set
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top5k complexity:intro

column1: Say "I came from Osaka" (use から for origin).
column3: おおさかからきました。
column5: から: source particle — marks origin point of movement or reason chain
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: Say "Who is coming?" using が for the unknown subject.
column5: が: subject particle — marks unknown/questioning subject in WH questions
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: Say "I study until midnight" (use まで).
column3: よなかまでべんきょうします。
column5: まで: temporal endpoint particle — marks the deadline or duration ceiling
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: Say "I came by bicycle" (use で for means).
column3: じてんしゃできました。
column5: で: instrumental particle — marks the means or method used for the action
column7: module:00-foundation jlpt:n5 source:shin-kanzen point:particles-core frequency:top10k complexity:intro
